notes: Data dir with a prebuilt profile + cached daily/radar lives at ../arxiv-digest-workspace/data. For test runs, the digest is saved to a markdown file instead of posting to Slack (Slack delivery is wired separately once content is approved).

evals.name: morning-digest-default
evals.prompt: Run my arxiv digest for this morning.
evals.expected_output: A relevance-ranked digest of the day's new astro-ph papers: top papers deep-read with an abstract-style summary + a specific 'why this matters to you' tied to the user's work, one-liners for the rest, and vetted missed-citation radar alerts. Grounded in real arXiv ids/links; honest about thin days and coverage caveats.

evals.name: scooped-radar-emphasis
evals.prompt: What's new on arXiv in my field today, and did anyone cite my competitors but not me?
evals.expected_output: Same digest, with the missed-citation radar foregrounded: for each flagged new paper, which sibling/contemporary of the user it cited and which of the user's papers it omitted, vetted for plausibility (weak leads dropped).
